ideation: This animation sequence will depict a welcoming gesture, suitable for a hotel.  The robot will extend both arms slightly outward and downward, palms up, as if offering a warm greeting or service.  The arms will move in a smooth, inviting arc. The animation will emphasize gentle movement to convey a sense of calm and hospitality. Frame 1 will have the arms at the sides. Frame 2 will show arms starting to move out. Frame 3 will show arms in the final welcoming position. Frame 4 will show arms returning to the sides.

frames.beat: arms hang at sides, ready to welcome
arms begin to open, a gentle invitation
arms extend outward, palms up in greeting
arms begin to close, the welcome recedes
arms return to rest at the sides
